mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM contents_cmmt_stats WHERE CTNT_NO = #{ctntNo})
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CMMT_CNT), 0) AS totalCommentCnt, COALESCE(MAX(CMMT_CNT), 0) AS maxCommentCnt, COUNT(CASE WHEN CMMT_CNT > 0 THEN 1 END) AS contentCount FROM contents_cmmt_stats
mapper.insert: ㄱㅣㅅ INSERT INTO contents_cmmt_stats (CTNT_NO, CMMT_CNT, INP_DTTM, UPD_DTTM) VALUES (#{ctntNo}, #{commentCnt}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CMMT_CNT = VALUES(CMMT_CNT), UPD_DTTM = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE contents_cmmt_stats SET CMMT_CNT = #{commentCnt}, UPD_DTTM = NOW() WHERE CTNT_NO = #{ctntNo}
